description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat, dark gray roof and a clean, geometric design. The front facade features a combination of large windows, a balcony with glass railing, and a covered entryway adjacent to a single-car garage. The exterior walls are finished in light gray, complemented by horizontal wooden slat fencing that encloses a small yard on two sides. The rear of the house opens onto a private green lawn, bordered by the same wooden fencing, and includes a spacious patio area beneath the upper balcony. The side view reveals additional windows and a driveway leading to the garage, while the opposite side is mostly solid with minimal openings. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing straight lines and functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, a balcony, and wooden fencing enclosing a green yard. The design is sleek and geometric, with a garage and covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, balcony, and large windows, with paved driveway and walkway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, wooden fencing, and a large green yard extending to the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the private lawn, patio area, and balcony above, with extensive wooden fencing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a mostly solid wall with minimal windows and the continuation of the driveway.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway adjacent to garage, with a simple door and no steps, sheltered by an overhanging roof
